prompt: Add the ring from the reference image to the corresponding finger in the source hand X-ray. Ensure proper alignment and X-ray transparency, maintaining anatomical consistency with the surrounding bones.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the blue-toned hand X-ray. Integrate the ring visible on the ring finger in image 2 (the black-and-white X-ray) onto the ring finger (fourth digit from the thumb) of the hand in image 1. The added ring must be accurately aligned and exhibit X-ray transparency consistent with the metallic appearance and density seen in image 2. Ensure the ring's placement and visual style are anatomically consistent with the bones and the overall X-ray aesthetic of image 1.
objects: The ring on the ring finger (fourth digit from the thumb)
The ring exhibiting metallic X-ray transparency and density
The ring accurately aligned on the finger
